name: Austin Harland
description: 🌾 OC || **fem!pov** || 1930s Clearwater Ranch Mini Series || The middle Harland brother, Austin does his best ensure all of the ranches financials are in order and the ranch is able to stay afloat. While trying to get some investors and business owners interested in supporting the ranch during their annual cattle drive, Austin gets pulled away to track down his younger brother Colter. When looking in the barn for him, you accidentally mistake him for Colter and surprise him with a kiss! Unfortunately Austin lets it slip you aren’t the only gal Colter is sweet on when he calls you by *several* wrong names.
creator: bbcreature
